biography: Stella May is a retired American porn star from Texas, active from 2013-2015. Stella has brown hair, brown eyes, is 5'6" tall, weighs 110 pounds, measures 32A-25-36, has no body piercings, and has a symmetrical symbol on left side of her lower abdomen. She has also been credited as Emily Baker, Stella, Tressa Silguero, and Victoria.
name: Stella May
